chunks.text: All merit-based scholarships at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus are continued in subsequent semesters only if the student maintains a CGPA of 3.3 out of 4.0, or as per CUI rules. If a student's CGPA drops below this threshold, the merit scholarship is discontinued. However, exactly one chance for restoration of the scholarship is allowed during the entire degree program (spanning 8 semesters). Students involved in any disciplinary matter are permanently disqualified from all types of scholarships with no exceptions.

At COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus, a one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is charged at the time of admission for all programs. This fee is in addition to the semester fee. The admission fee is NOT charged for students admitted under Special Scholarship programs and students from the Daanish School System.

The scholarship scheme described here is effective for Spring 2026 only at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. The fee structure is subject to revision at CUI, PS Islamabad at any stage. Students should verify current amounts with the Student Support Center each semester.

The High Achievers Scholarship at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus provides a 100% tuition fee waiver to students who secured a Top Ten (10) Board Position from any Board across Pakistan. This applies to all undergraduate degree programs. The student pays only Rs. 7,000 per semester, covering non-tuition charges. No separate application is needed — position holders are identified at admission. Continuation requires maintaining a CGPA of 3.3 out of 4.0.

metadata.scholarship_name: High Achievers Scholarship — All UG Programs (Top 10 Board)

chunks.text:
Q: I got a top 10 position in my Board exams. What scholarship do I get at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: You qualify for the High Achievers Scholarship — 100% tuition fee waiver. You only pay Rs. 7,000 per semester.

Q: Does the top 10 board scholarship apply to all programs?
A: Yes. It applies to all undergraduate degree programs at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus.

Q: Do I need to apply separately for this scholarship?
A: No. You will be identified at the time of admission based on your board result.

chunks.text: The Merit Scholarship — BS Engineering 90%+ (FSc/ICS/A-Level) is a merit-based, internally funded scholarship available to students admitted into BS Engineering programs at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. It is awarded to candidates who scored 90.0% or above in their FSc / ICS / A-level examination. The total semester fee is Rs. 151,500.0, which includes a total tuition fee of Rs. 144,500.0. Under this scholarship, Rs. 99,000.0 is waived from the tuition fee, leaving the student responsible for paying Rs. 52,500.0 per semester. This scholarship continues in subsequent semesters provided the student maintains a CGPA of 3.3 out of 4.0. One restoration chance is allowed if the CGPA drops. Students involved in disciplinary matters are permanently disqualified. A one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is charged separately at the time of admission.

Q: I got 90.0% in my FSc / ICS / A-level. How much scholarship will I get for BS Engineering?
A: You qualify for the Merit Scholarship — BS Engineering 90%+ (FSc/ICS/A-Level). Your tuition fee waiver is Rs. 99,000.0 per semester. You will pay Rs. 52,500.0 per semester (total semester fee is Rs. 151,500.0).

Q: What is the minimum percentage required to get Rs. 99,000.0 scholarship in BS Engineering (FSc / ICS / A-level)?
A: You need 90.0% or above in FSc / ICS / A-level to receive this scholarship.

Q: Will I lose the scholarship if my CGPA drops?
A: Yes. You must maintain a CGPA of 3.3/4.0. If it drops, the scholarship is discontinued. However, one restoration chance is allowed during the entire degree.

Q: Is the admission fee included in the Rs. 52,500.0 I pay per semester?
A: No. A one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is charged separately at admission.

The Merit Scholarship — BS Biotechnology / BS Food Science & Nutrition / HND 65%+ is a merit-based, internally funded scholarship for students admitted into BS Non-Engineering programs at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. Students who scored 65.0% or above in their Intermediate or equivalent examination are eligible. The total semester fee is Rs. 135,000.0 (tuition fee Rs. 128,000.0). A scholarship of Rs. 37,500.0 is deducted from tuition, so the student pays Rs. 97,500.0 per semester. Continuation requires a CGPA of 3.3/4.0 or higher. One CGPA restoration chance is permitted across the full degree (8 semesters). Disciplinary violations result in permanent disqualification. A one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 applies.

chunks.text:
Q: I scored 65.0% in FSc. What scholarship do I get for a BS Non-Engineering program?
A: You qualify for the Merit Scholarship — BS Biotechnology / BS Food Science & Nutrition / HND 65%+. You receive Rs. 37,500.0 off your tuition and pay Rs. 97,500.0 per semester.

Q: How much is the total semester fee after this scholarship?
A: Rs. 97,500.0 per semester (down from Rs. 135,000.0).

Q: What CGPA must I maintain to keep this scholarship?
A: You must maintain a CGPA of 3.3 out of 4.0. One restoration chance is given.

chunks.text: The Special Scholarship — BS English Program is a special, internally funded scholarship available to all eligible and admitted students of the BS English program at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. The scholarship provides a tuition fee waiver of Rs. 65,000 per semester. The student pays Rs. 70,000 per semester as the semester fee. No separate application is needed — all admitted BS English students receive it. CGPA of 3.3/4.0 must be maintained for continuation.

Q: How much scholarship do BS English students get?
A: All admitted BS English students receive a tuition fee waiver of Rs. 65,000 per semester and pay Rs. 70,000 per semester.

Q: Do I need to apply for the BS English scholarship?
A: No. It is automatically awarded to all eligible admitted students.

The Special Scholarship — BS Bioinformatics / BBA / BS Mathematics / BS Mathematics with Data Science is a special, internally funded scholarship at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. It is automatically awarded to all eligible and admitted students of the relevant program — no separate application is required. In the first semester, tuition fee waiver is Rs. 59,000, and for the remaining seven semesters the waiver is Rs. 37,000 per semester. The student pays Rs. 98,000 per semester (total semester fee Rs. 135,000.0). A one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is NOT charged for special scholarship students. CGPA of 3.3/4.0 must be maintained for continuation.

metadata.scholarship_name: Special Scholarship — BS Bioinformatics / BBA / BS Mathematics / BS Mathematics with Data Science
metadata.program_type: BS Bioinformatics / BBA / BS Mathematics / BS Mathematics with Data Science

chunks.text:
Q: Do I need to apply separately for the Special Scholarship — BS Bioinformatics / BBA / BS Mathematics / BS Mathematics with Data Science?
A: No. It is automatically awarded to all admitted students of the program.

Q: How much will I pay per semester under this scholarship?
A: Rs. 98,000 per semester. In semester 1 the tuition waiver is Rs. 59,000; from semester 2 onward the waiver is Rs. 37,000.

Q: Is the Rs. 22,000 admission fee charged for special scholarship students?
A: No. The admission fee is waived for all special scholarship program students.

chunks.text: The Special Scholarship for Students of Daanish Schools System is available at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. It provides a lumpsum scholarship of up to full fee waiver, determined as per PEEF Eligibility Criteria alongside CUI Sahiwal Campus Scholarship policy. The one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is not charged for Daanish School students.

Q: Is there a scholarship for Daanish School students at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. Daanish School students can receive a lumpsum scholarship of up to full fee waiver.

Q: How is the Daanish Schools scholarship amount determined?
A: It is determined as per PEEF Eligibility Criteria alongside CUI Sahiwal Campus Scholarship policy.

Q: Is the admission fee charged for Daanish School students?
A: No. The Rs. 22,000 admission fee is waived for Daanish School students.

Q: How do I claim the kinship concession?
A: Visit the Student Support Center with proof of sibling enrollment.

Q: What is the Punjab Educational Endowment Fund (PEEF) Special Quota?
A: It is an externally funded scholarship. Eligibility: As per PEEF Eligibility Criteria.

Q: How do I apply for the Punjab Educational Endowment Fund (PEEF) Special Quota?
A: Contact the Student Support Center at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus with your documents. The final award is subject to the funding body's approval.

Q: Is the amount of the Punjab Educational Endowment Fund (PEEF) Special Quota fixed?
A: No. The amount depends on the funding body's approval and may vary each semester.

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus is located on COMSATS Road, off G.T Road, Sahiwal — situated halfway between Lahore and Multan. The campus was formally inaugurated on September 23, 2006, and is a purposely built facility spread over 36 acres of land. It is a public sector university operating under the Ministry of Science and Technology, Government of Pakistan. The official admission procedure is available online at https://admissions.comsats.edu.pk/home/procedure

Q: Where is COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus located?
A: It is located on COMSATS Road, off G.T Road, Sahiwal — halfway between Lahore and Multan.

Q: When was COMSATS Sahiwal Campus established?
A: The campus was formally inaugurated on September 23, 2006.

Q: How large is the COMSATS Sahiwal Campus?
A: The campus is spread over 36 acres of purposely built land.

Q: Where can I find the admission procedure for COMSATS?
A: The admission procedure is available online at https://admissions.comsats.edu.pk/home/procedure
Topic: Campus Introduction & Location | Category: general_info | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus has 5 academic blocks and 1 faculty block. There is 1 hostel located outside the campus. The campus has a total of 214 faculty members, of whom 66 hold PhD degrees. There are 8 academic departments offering 14 undergraduate programs and 9 graduate programs. Total student enrollment stands at 3,675.

Q: How many students are enrolled at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus?
A: Total enrollment is 3,675 students.

Q: How many faculty members does COMSATS Sahiwal have?
A: There are 214 total faculty members, of whom 66 hold PhD degrees.

Q: How many programs are offered at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: 14 undergraduate programs and 9 graduate programs are offered.

Q: How many academic departments does COMSATS Sahiwal have?
A: There are 8 academic departments.

Q: How many blocks does COMSATS Sahiwal Campus have?
A: There are 5 academic blocks, 1 faculty block, and 1 workshop block (Block W).
Topic: Campus Facts & Figures | Category: general_info | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus offers the following undergraduate (BS-level) programs: Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science, Telecommunication & Network, Software Engineering, Bioinformatics, Biosciences, Food Science & Nutrition, Business Administration, and Accounts & Finance. A total of 14 undergraduate programs are offered across 8 academic departments.

Q: What undergraduate programs are offered at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: BS programs offered include: Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science, Telecommunication & Network, Software Engineering, Bioinformatics, Biosciences, Food Science & Nutrition, Business Administration, and Accounts & Finance.

Q: Does COMSATS Sahiwal offer BS Computer Science?
A: Yes. BS Computer Science is offered at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus.

Q: Does COMSATS Sahiwal offer engineering programs?
A: Yes. BS Mechanical Engineering, BS Electrical Engineering, BS Civil Engineering, BS Software Engineering, and BS Telecommunication & Network are all offered.

Q: Is there a business program at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. BS Business Administration and BS Accounts & Finance are both available.
Topic: Undergraduate Programs Offered | Category: academics | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus offers the following graduate programs: MS Mechanical Engineering, MS Management Sciences, MS Computer Science, MS Biosciences, MBA (1.5 years), and MS Mathematics. A total of 9 graduate programs are offered. PhD programs are also available in select disciplines.

Q: What graduate programs are offered at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Graduate programs include: MS Mechanical Engineering, MS Management Sciences, MS Computer Science, MS Biosciences, MBA (1.5 years), and MS Mathematics.

Q: Is MBA available at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. An MBA (1.5 years) program is offered at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus.

Q: Does COMSATS Sahiwal offer MS Computer Science?
A: Yes. MS Computer Science is available at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus.

Q: Are PhD programs available at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. PhD programs are offered in select disciplines including Computer Science, Management Sciences, Mathematics, and Microbiology & Immunology.
Topic: Graduate Programs Offered | Category: academics | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus is organized into five blocks. Block A houses the Engineering Department. Block B is for Management Sciences. Block C is for Computer Science. Block D houses Biosciences and Mathematics. Block W contains the workshops. There is also a separate faculty block on campus.

Q: Where is the Computer Science department at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: The Computer Science department is in Block C.

Q: Where is the Engineering department at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: The Engineering Department is in Block A.

Q: Where is the Management Sciences department?
A: Management Sciences is in Block B.

Q: Where is the Biosciences department at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Biosciences and Mathematics are both located in Block D.

Q: What is Block W at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Block W contains the workshops.
Topic: Campus Blocks & Department Locations | Category: campus_facilities | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus has a cafeteria located in the center of the campus, on the left side of A-block. It offers a variety of food items including fast food, shakes, and traditional dishes. A printing shop is located next to the cafeteria. Students can use the printing shop to print documents, assignments, and other academic materials.

Q: Where is the cafeteria at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: The cafeteria is located in the center of the campus.

Q: What food is available at the COMSATS Sahiwal cafeteria?
A: The cafeteria offers fast food, shakes, and traditional dishes.

Q: Where can I print documents on campus?
A: The printing shop is located next to the cafeteria on campus.

Q: Is there a canteen or food area at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. There is a cafeteria in the center of the campus offering fast food, shakes, and traditional dishes.
Topic: Cafeteria & Printing Shop | Category: campus_facilities | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

At COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus, students do not have dedicated car parking. Bike parking is available outside the campus at a fee of Rs. 20. Faculty members are permitted to park both cars and bikes inside the university premises.

Q: Is there car parking for students at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: No. Students do not have dedicated car parking at the campus.

Q: Is there bike parking for students at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. Bike parking is available outside the campus at Rs. 20.

Q: Can faculty park inside COMSATS Sahiwal Campus?
A: Yes. Faculty members can park both cars and bikes inside the university.

Q: How much does bike parking cost at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Bike parking outside the campus costs Rs. 20.
Topic: Parking Facilities | Category: campus_facilities | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

An electric bus service operates outside COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. The bus runs every 1 hour and 15 minutes and provides routes to Gamber (located before Okara) and Sahiwal City. This service facilitates commuting for students and staff traveling to and from the campus.

Q: Is there a bus service at COMSATS Sahiwal Campus?
A: Yes. An electric bus operates outside the campus every 1 hour and 15 minutes.

Q: What routes does the COMSATS Sahiwal electric bus cover?
A: The bus covers routes to Gamber (before Okara) and Sahiwal City.

Q: How often does the electric bus run at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: The bus runs every 1 hour and 15 minutes.

Q: How can I travel to COMSATS Sahiwal from Sahiwal City?
A: An electric bus runs from Sahiwal City to the campus every 1 hour and 15 minutes.
Topic: Electric Bus & Transport | Category: campus_facilities | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus has several outdoor spaces. A sports ground is located at the front right corner of the campus. A small pandal (covered outdoor area) is situated in front of the Admission Office. The main pandal is located at the backside of the CS Block (Block C).

Q: Where is the sports ground at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: The sports ground is at the front right corner of the campus.

Q: Where is the main pandal at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: The main pandal is at the backside of the CS Block (Block C).

Q: Is there an outdoor event space at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. There is a small pandal in front of the Admission Office and a main pandal at the back of the CS Block.
Topic: Grounds, Sports & Pandals | Category: campus_facilities | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus doesn't have any specific hostel facility for boys, but their are private hostels just outside the university. For girls, there's a hostel near Virtual University Sahiwal. Students can get further information from the Student support center.

Q: Does COMSATS Sahiwal have a hostel?
A: Yes. There is one hostel, located outside the main campus.

Q: Is the hostel inside or outside COMSATS Sahiwal Campus?
A: The hostel is located outside the campus.

Q: How many hostels does COMSATS Sahiwal have?
A: There is one hostel facility located outside the main campus.
Topic: Hostel | Category: campus_facilities | Source: basic_info | Semester: spring_2026

At COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus, the admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is a one-time payment charged to new students at the time of admission, in addition to the semester fee. If a student registers for an additional semester beyond the normal program duration, an extra registration fee and a credit hour fee will apply. The credit hour fee is Rs. 6,000 per credit hour for undergraduate and Master's programs, and Rs. 4,000 per credit hour for MS and PhD programs. Upon successful completion of the degree, a degree fee of Rs. 10,000 is charged.

metadata.topic_label: Additional Fees — Registration, Credit Hour & Degree

chunks.text:
Q: What is the admission fee at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Rs. 22,000 — a one-time payment charged at admission, in addition to the semester fee.

Q: What is the credit hour fee at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Rs. 6,000 per credit hour for undergraduate and Master's programs. Rs. 4,000 per credit hour for MS and PhD programs.

Q: Is there a degree fee at COMSATS Sahiwal?
A: Yes. A degree fee of Rs. 10,000 is charged upon completion of the program.

Q: What extra charges apply if I take an additional semester?
A: An extra registration fee and a credit hour fee will apply. Credit hour fee is Rs. 6,000 (UG/Masters) or Rs. 4,000 (MS/PhD) per credit hour.

Q: Is the Rs. 22,000 admission fee charged every semester?
A: No. It is a one-time charge paid only at the time of admission.

chunks.text: The admission fee at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus is Rs. 22,000. This is a one-time payment charged only at the time of admission — it is not charged again in subsequent semesters. Programs under the Special Scholarship scheme (BS Bioinformatics, BS Business Administration, BS Mathematics, BS Mathematics with Data Science, and BS English) do not have a separate admission fee — they use a lumpsum fee model of Rs. 86,000 instead.

At COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus, a one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is charged at the time of admission for most programs. This is a non-recurring charge — it is paid only once and does not apply to subsequent semesters. Programs under the Special Scholarship scheme (BS Bioinformatics, BS Business Administration, BS Mathematics, BS Mathematics with Data Science, and BS English) do not charge a separate admission fee; instead they operate on a lumpsum fee model of Rs. 86,000.

Certain BS programs at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus use a lumpsum fee model instead of a standard semester fee plus admission fee structure. These programs are: BS Bioinformatics, BS Business Administration, BS Mathematics, BS Mathematics with Data Science, and BS English. For these programs, the total fee is Rs. 86,000 as a lumpsum — no additional admission fee is charged. This model exists because these programs are covered under a special internal scholarship that restructures the payment.

All fee figures for COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus are specific to Spring 2026 and are subject to revision by CUI, PS Islamabad at any stage. Students should confirm the current fee with the Accounts Office or Student Support Center before each semester. Fee structures may change between semesters.

Fee structure overview for COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus, Spring 2026. BS Engineering / CS programs (BS Software Engineering, BS Computer Science): Rs. 133,000 per semester + Rs. 22,000 admission fee. BS Life Sciences programs (BS Food Science & Nutrition, BS Biochemistry, BS Biotechnology, BS Agriculture): Rs. 123,000 per semester + Rs. 22,000 admission fee. Special scholarship BS programs (BS Bioinformatics, BS Business Administration, BS Mathematics, BS Mathematics with Data Science, BS English): Rs. 86,000 lumpsum, no admission fee. MS programs (all disciplines): Rs. 77,000 per semester + Rs. 22,000 admission fee. PhD programs (all disciplines): Rs. 83,000 per semester + Rs. 22,000 admission fee.

BS Software Engineering is a BS-level program offered at COMSATS University Islamabad, Sahiwal Campus. The semester fee is Rs. 133,000 per semester. In addition, a one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is charged at the time of admission. The admission fee is a non-recurring charge paid only once throughout the degree. Fee figures are for Spring 2026 and are subject to revision by CUI, PS Islamabad. Students should confirm the current fee with the Accounts Office or Student Support Center before each semester.

Q: What is the semester fee for BS Software Engineering?
A: The semester fee is Rs. 133,000 per semester for Spring 2026.

Q: Is there an admission fee for BS Software Engineering?
A: Yes. A one-time admission fee of Rs. 22,000 is charged at the time of admission. It is paid only once and is non-refundable.

Q: What is the total cost in the first semester of BS Software Engineering?
A: In the first semester you pay Rs. 133,000 (semester fee) + Rs. 22,000 (one-time admission fee) = Rs. 155,000 total.

Q: Can the fee for BS Software Engineering change?
A: Yes. Fee figures are for Spring 2026 and are subject to revision by CUI, PS Islamabad at any stage. Always confirm with the Accounts Office.
Program: BS Software Engineering | Level: BS | Category: engineering_cs | Semester fee: Rs. 133,000 | Admission fee: Rs. 22,000 | Lumpsum model: False | Source: fee_structure | Semester: spring_2026
